texts:
PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuáles son las políticas más recientes sobre retribución flexible que se implementaron hasta octubre de 2023, y cómo afectan estas políticas al paquete de compensación total de los empleados a partir de diciembre de 2023?

2. ¿Hubo algún cambio en las normativas relacionadas con la retribución flexible o los beneficios a los empleados que tenga efecto a partir de diciembre de 2023, y cómo se espera que estos cambios influyan en la motivación y retención del personal?

3. Con base en las tendencias de datos hasta octubre de 2023, ¿cuáles son las prácticas recomendadas para implementar un programa de retribución flexible efectivo que satisfaga tanto las necesidades de los empleados como los objetivos de la empresa durante y después de diciembre de 2023?
---
Flexible
Retribution
December 2023

PREGUNTAS:
1. How does Flexible Remuneration impact an employee's personal income tax, and what regulations govern its application?
   
2. Can an employee voluntarily choose to receive a portion of their salary in benefits through Flexible Remuneration, and if so, what advantage does this offer in terms of increasing net salary?

3. What types of payments made under Flexible Remuneration are exempt from personal income tax according to the Workers' Statute and Personal Income Tax Law?
---
What is Flexible Remuneration?



A system that allows you to increase your salary thanks to the tax savings you obtain by contracting the products...

Flexible Remuneration is the formula by which a person can voluntarily receive part of their salary in benefits, increasing their net salary by reducing personal income tax.


Under the regulation of the Workers' Statute and the Personal Income Tax Law, products and services paid using this formula are exempt from personal income tax. In this way, payments are made from the gross salary of each person.



Text in blue shall be used for the explanation of the chart or the data source. 
For conclusions section, please use the text box on the left side.

PREGUNTAS:
1. How can I effectively leverage the flexibility offered in choosing options related to learning, family care, leisure, and transport to maximize my personal and professional benefits?

2. What are the potential advantages or disadvantages of participating collectively versus individually when it comes to obtaining products and services at better prices through this offering?

3. Can you elaborate on the specific ways the company demonstrates that it cares for its employees regarding the options for higher net salary and flexible benefits?
---
What’s in it for you? 
Higher net salary and a variety of options
Get higher net salary
We offer different options: learning, family care, leisure, transport
Your flexibility is the key: choose, modify and enjoy your choice 


Products and services with better price: collective vs individual
Voluntary participation: you decide 
We CARE!

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuál es el procedimiento para utilizar la clave de validación si un empleado no recuerda su nombre de usuario y contraseña al intentar acceder al sitio web de Edenred?
2. ¿Cómo puede un empleado obtener información detallada sobre los planes disponibles al usar el sistema por primera vez?
3. Si un empleado tiene preguntas durante su acceso al sistema, ¿cuáles son las opciones disponibles para obtener respuestas o asistencia?
---
User’s Guide
Use this guide for an easy and quick access to the system


Access Edenred website directly with your username and password or validation key
Find plans’ details when you access the system for the first time
Got questions:
HR team

Chat in the system; Contact us

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuáles son las consecuencias de usar un correo electrónico distinto al personal al registrarse en la plataforma y cómo puede esto afectar mi acceso y gestión de datos personales de manera efectiva después de octubre de 2023?

2. ¿Qué disposiciones específicas están contempladas en el acuerdo de retribución flexible que debo firmar, y cómo se esperaba que estas provisionen cambios de remuneración a partir de las directrices establecidas hasta octubre de 2023?

3. ¿Qué medidas de seguridad están implementadas para garantizar la protección de la contraseña asociada a mi cuenta, teniendo en cuenta la capacitación y actualizaciones de seguridad hasta octubre de 2023?
---
Modify your Personal Data
The first time you enter the platform, fill in your personal data and other data not added
Mail: 
we recommend you signing up with your personal email address.
Password: remember carefully the password you assign to this account.


Important: 
Don't forget to sign the flexible retribution agreement!

PREGUNTAS:
1. How do the Restaurant Card, Transportation Card, and Nursery options impact my overall savings, and is there a tool or simulator available to visualize these savings before making a decision by the 15th of the month?

2. Could you explain where exactly on the "Mi Plan" page I can access the summary of my remuneration and potentially evaluate the benefits associated with the flexible remuneration options?

3. What specific deadline applies for making choices regarding flexible remuneration benefits like the Restaurant Card, Transportation Card, and Nursery, and how can I ensure I am maximizing my savings in accordance with these offerings?
---
Flexible Remuneration

Until the 15th of each month decide whether you want to contract Restaurant Card, Transportation Card and Nursery for the following month.
To see your savings check 
a simulator located on the left side of the screen 

Find your remuneration summary on the "Mi Plan" page 
In this section you can see all the benefits to which you have access

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cómo asegura la empresa la entrega agile escalada de desarrollo de productos personalizados y plataformas avanzadas?
2. ¿Cuál es el proceso para incluir los datos de contacto de nuestra guardería en el sistema para que los pagos mensuales sean realizados por EDENRED?
3. ¿Dónde puedo acceder a la biblioteca de imágenes mencionada en el enlace proporcionado, y cómo puedo utilizarla para el desarrollo de tecnología avanzada?
---
Product
Engineering
From custom platform and product development to scaled agile delivery, we join forces to build advanced technology solutions
Image library for your reference & usage - LINK  
Nursery
To order this product, add your request in the "Mi Plan" section.

"Guardería" - add contacts of your nursery, so we can pay for it. 

"Monthly payments" - add your nursery monthly fee. It will be transferred  by EDENRED each month.

PREGUNTAS:
1. How can I link my Edenred card to my mobile phone, and what is the deadline for activating this feature?

2. If I want to ensure the monthly recharge for the entire year on my Edenred card, what is the process, and is there a specific feature I need to use in the system to achieve this?

3. When using the Edenred card at restaurants or delivery services, are there any restrictions on where it can be used, and how do I know if a payment gateway is registered with the restaurant code?
---
Restaurant and Transport Card


Request the Edenred card in "Mi Plan" form to order this option

Edenred will allow linking your card with the mobile phone, you will need to activate it within the first 7 days since receiving it.


To edit the bar reflecting the main number on the slide, please regulate the height of the blue element 

Text in blue shall be used for the explanation of the chart or the data source. 
For conclusions, please use the text box on the left side. 
Monthly recharges - set the deposit for each month on your card. Click on “Save”. You can request for the whole year

Use the card in any restaurant, bar and delivery service whose payment gateway is registered with the restaurant code
